summary: Deliver C5 as a stock-compatible OpenSCAD Customizer: structural annotation extraction, grouped typed controls, document-bound non-destructive preview overrides, exact source writes, revision-safe parameter state, stock-v1 named sets, and parameter-aware render, viewer, and export identity.
specSections: Section 2.7 questions, decisions, and unit of work
Section 5 N-3 through N-5 and N-7
Section 6 A-8 OpenSCAD structural parsing dependency policy

externalInputs.purpose: Use the public OpenSCAD Customizer contract for top-level literals, annotations, Hidden behavior, controls, named sets, the exact JSON v1 shape, and stock -p/-P interchange.
Confirm the A-8-approved official OpenSCAD-organization grammar release and use its MIT source only as an attributed structural reference; ScadMill's fresh Lezer grammar remains runtime authority.
Bind the inspected official scoped 0.6.1 package metadata and tarball SHA-256 AC4943D8817B0AEB712D8EBC2AF8B9C61D6D841094E9DF87755796D55F17E2B1.

decisions.decision: Parse with ScadMill's generated Lezer OpenSCAD parser, inspect top-level syntax nodes in source order, pass through comments/include/use/empty statements, accept unique eligible literal assignments, and stop at the first structural module, function, or geometry statement. Use official scoped tree-sitter 0.6.1 source as an attributed reference only.
decisions.rationale: Structural parsing avoids false boundaries inside strings and comments while keeping one runtime grammar and no unused second parser.

decisions.decision: Normalize supported stock annotations into typed group, Hidden, description, slider, stepped-slider, dropdown, checkbox, numeric, text, and one-to-four-component vector records; degrade malformed or incompatible annotations to a plain control without throwing.
decisions.rationale: One typed schema supports deterministic source-order presentation and the required graceful fallback.

decisions.decision: Reparse accepted revisions per document, retain only visible compatible values that still differ from source defaults, drop renamed, removed, hidden, incompatible, or newly redundant live overrides, preserve forward-compatible named-set data, reset stale identities on fresh external opens, and clear selected-set claims after source edits.
decisions.rationale: Source remains schema and default authority without losing saved values that may become applicable after a later edit.

decisions.topic: Non-destructive overrides and explicit source writes
decisions.decision: Send own-property-safe typed override snapshots to the engine without rewriting source. On explicit write, validate current ranges, replace scalar right-hand sides or only changed vector component tokens from right to left, preserve comments, spacing, and unchanged numeric spelling, then clear redundant overrides.
decisions.rationale: Controls stay non-destructive and explicit writes cannot delete inline vector comments or apply offsets from obsolete source.

decisions.decision: Encode exactly the stock parameterSets plus fileFormatVersion 1 object with string values; validate OpenSCAD identifiers including one optional leading dollar; safely support constructor, prototype, and __proto__; retain Hidden values through decode and storage but skip them while Hidden during application; ignore keys absent from the current schema.
decisions.rationale: This preserves two-way stock compatibility and future visibility semantics without prototype mutation or invalid engine keys.

decisions.topic: Document-bound render, viewer, project, and export identity
decisions.decision: Make parameter state part of runtime composition; keep pending automatic render quality per document; never let one tab consume another tab's debounce; re-arm pending intent on activation; clear only the rendered or closed identity; pass the same active override snapshot to preview, full render, viewer freshness checks, and C6 full export; reset pending intent on project replacement.
decisions.rationale: A document-bound snapshot and debounce boundary keeps engine output, tab switches, viewer honesty, and exports consistent.

decisions.topic: Customizer panel and bounded set exchange
decisions.decision: Render contiguous source-order collapsible group occurrences, omit Hidden controls, expose typed controls and individual/all reset, manage named sets, and import/export through the artifact destination with a 1 MiB pre-read limit, visible failure, and atomic replacement.
decisions.rationale: Presentation remains separate from reducer state while bounded, accessible exchange preserves responsiveness and user intent.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-5.1, FR-5.6, and AC-5.a structural extraction
testEvidence.test: The all-annotation fixture yields the exact eligible source-order parameters, controls, groups, Hidden records, descriptions, and stable assignment/value/component ranges; false boundaries and malformed annotations are handled safely.

red.outcome: RED: 1 file failed; 3 tests failed; duration 466 ms. The inert parser returned empty control lists and missing ranges.

green.outcome: GREEN: 1 file passed; 3 tests passed; duration 467 ms.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-5.3, FR-5.5, AC-5.b, and AC-5.d parameter state and exact writes
testEvidence.test: Overrides are typed and own-property-safe, survive only compatible visible names, drop renamed, hidden, stale, incompatible, and newly redundant values, preserve vector comments and formatting on explicit write, and reset fresh document identities.

red.outcome: RED: 3 files failed; 22 tests failed; duration 571 ms. Later falsification REDs separately caught vector comment deletion, Hidden live retention, stale set application, invalid identifier acceptance, and a redundant override after source adopted its value.

green.outcome: GREEN: independent final adversarial audit passed 8 files and 58 tests in 1.19 s; no remaining evidence-backed C5 defect was found.

testEvidence.test: A parameter change always schedules preview quality for its own document; switching tabs cannot redirect it; multiple documents retain independent intent; activation re-arms the correct preview; manual render, close, replacement, disable, and disposal clear only the appropriate pending state.

red.command: node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime-parameters.test.ts -t "retains preview intent|clears pending preview" --reporter=verbose
red.outcome: RED: 1 file failed; 2 tests failed and 6 were filtered; duration 696 ms. A's timer rendered b.scad with empty parameters, and closing A caused a ghost render.

green.outcome: GREEN: 2 files passed; 28 tests passed; duration 636 ms, including independent A/B pending previews and project replacement cleanup.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-5.2 and FR-5.4 grouped controls, Hidden behavior, named sets, and bounded exchange
testEvidence.test: The panel preserves contiguous A/B/A source-order group occurrences, hides Hidden controls, routes value/reset/write/set actions, and imports or exports exact stock JSON atomically with bounded input and visible failures.

red.outcome: RED: focused panel, WorkspaceFrame, and Workbench composition assertions failed before controls and the parameter-content seam were implemented; a later A/B/A regression failed because repeated labels were merged.

green.outcome: GREEN: these files passed within the 11-file focused C5 run; the run passed 93 tests in 4.00 s. Subsequent group-key lint and falsification checks also passed.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-5.3 full-export override forwarding and hostile-key safety
testEvidence.test: The C6 export adapter receives an independent exact scalar/vector override snapshot, current entry/files and full timeout, no preview fields, unchanged source, and inert own __proto__ data.

red.outcome: RED: 1 file failed; 1 test failed; duration 748 ms. The export request received an empty parameter object. A later hostile-key RED showed ordinary assignment changed the object's prototype.

green.outcome: GREEN: the focused adversarial export test passed with a copied scalar/vector/__proto__ snapshot and normal Object prototype.

testEvidence.criterion: FR-5.3 and N-7 parameter-aware viewer freshness
testEvidence.test: A render whose source and project files remain current becomes stale when its saved parameter snapshot differs; current geometry is withheld and last-good geometry remains dimmed.

red.outcome: RED: 1 test failed and 4 were filtered; duration 495 ms. Old geometry remained current, not stale or dimmed.

green.outcome: GREEN: all 5 viewer-presentation tests passed inside the focused C5 run, including exact override-driven stale/dimmed assertions.

testEvidence.criterion: V-4 Customizer slider-to-re-render browser flow and mutation sensitivity
testEvidence.test: The browser fixture mounts the real Workbench/runtime, changes width visibly, waits the real debounce, observes exactly one additional preview with width 25, unchanged source, and completed viewer presentation.

red.outcome: RED under an intentional one-line mutation replacing parameter scheduling with timer clearing: 1 test failed after a 5 s poll; expected request count 2, received 1. The production line was immediately restored.

green.outcome: GREEN: 1 Chromium test passed in 3.3 s; test duration 2.1 s. The full browser suite later passed 9 tests.

testEvidence.criterion: AC-5.c two-way stock OpenSCAD parameter-set interchange
testEvidence.test: An app-written Compact set loads through stock OpenSCAD -p/-P and produces independently checked geometry; a stock-written fixture decodes and rewrites through app code retaining current keys and dropping only stale old.

red.outcome: RED is the codec's failing-first automated cycle; the once-per-release stock characterization is an acceptance run and this ledger does not invent a failed engine execution.

green.outcome: GREEN: fresh immutable sibling artifacts/ac-5c-stock-openscad-c5-20260711T175622Z passed against clean provisional commit fed5e29bfa12925fc1680e811ccb2fe3f0d4ccc7. Manifest and independent verifier verdicts were PASS; all 15 manifest assertions and all 12 verifier checks were true. Exact OpenSCAD 2026.06.12 executable SHA-256 DE9A0C732C23C3FEB0B49CF938777AA0AEE3E206DB9E98571672CACC4816C524 loaded the app-written Compact preset. Output STL SHA-256 07225323C0582DCC5A535BBCC46C222644476E7E0D7A02320C88777967F7D76D was 684 bytes, 12 triangles, bounds 25 x 4 x 3. Reverse codec passed 18 tests, retained width/enabled/title/point, removed only stale old, added no keys, and changed no known values. Manifest SHA-256 4DFD27F1CE1C41ABC9DEB0852E4C983D31FB994A5E50F853E59CCEA8B1CC46C3; initial verification SHA-256 311C60EDE5B7CE47A914BA8ECB40B4DAB75834AD3D2057E60F1484CE6F05A4FB.

testEvidence.criterion: V-1 and V-2 full C5 regression, exact engine pin, attribution, and policy gates
testEvidence.test: Web unit/component/browser, type, lint/source policy, production build, generated parser, npm licenses, exact-pin native/desktop Rust, provenance, and diff gates pass; no tree-sitter runtime dependency is present; Rust license policy remains honestly separate.

red.outcome: KNOWN OPEN POLICY RED: exit 1 with exactly 19 Unicode-3.0 records, blocked by Q-0001. The result is not claimed green and C5 product behavior is not blocked.

green.command: pnpm.cmd test; pnpm.cmd exec playwright test; pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd build; pnpm.cmd check:generated; pnpm.cmd check:licenses npm; exact-pin cargo fmt/test/check/clippy for native-engine and desktop-shell
green.outcome: GREEN after ledger creation: Vitest 102 files/727 tests in 10.57 s; Playwright 9 tests in 11.0 s; typecheck; lint/source policy across 268 files with Workbench at 399 lines; 173-module build; generated freshness; 117 npm licenses; native 24+1+3+11 tests and desktop 24 tests with fmt/check/warning-denying clippy. Exact engine OpenSCAD 2026.06.12, SHA-256 DE9A0C732C23C3FEB0B49CF938777AA0AEE3E206DB9E98571672CACC4816C524. Rust license remained the exact separate 19-record Q-0001 block.

questions: Q-0001 remains open: Rust license policy rejects exactly 19 Unicode-3.0 records. C5 records the failure without changing policy or claiming green.
No C5 behavior question is open under Section 2.7; implementation proceeds from v0.6 and the public Customizer contract.
The scoped official tree-sitter 0.6.1 source is reference-only and MIT-attributed. No unscoped predecessor, prohibited editor extension, or second runtime parser was added.
The retained artifacts/ac-5c-stock-openscad directory is immutable. C5 uses a fresh stable-run sibling against a clean provisional checkpoint, then binds final HEAD in gate-only metadata.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
